stemHtml:
Choose the correct statement in reference to the following windshield rain protection systems.

1. Chemical rain repellent
2. Pneumatic moisture clearance
3. Windshield wipers

options.a: 1 and 3 are commonly fitted to aircraft and can be used together or separately.
options.b: 1 and 3 are commonly fitted but due to safety reasons they must be used separately.
options.c: The use of all 3 is the most efficient at clearing rain.
options.d: 2 and 3 can be used together simultaneously, but 1 and 3 cannot, as it would result in rubber damage of the wiper.
